seconds.vision_desc: jar candle wrapped in crinkled aluminum foil with a round center opening
warm flame glow pulsing inside the foil collar
foil reflecting little flecks of flame light
steady burn, heat trapped under the foil ring
glow brightens softly as the walls warm
close framing of the foil rim and inner glow
flame flutter visible through the opening
final still of the foil-wrapped rescue burn

windows.embed_text: a glass jar candle with aluminum foil wrapped around its rim, a round opening in the middle, warm flame glow flickering inside the foil collar, wooden workbench in dim cozy light | the aluminum foil tunneling rescue trick
windows.embed_text_v2: a glass jar candle with aluminum foil wrapped around its rim, a round opening in the middle, warm flame glow flickering inside the foil collar, wooden workbench in dim cozy light | the aluminum foil tunneling rescue trick
windows.summary_v2: A jar candle burning with a foil collar wrapped around its rim, the classic tunneling rescue.
